title: Zoon Uber-Activ Rubber Squeaky Ball Dumbbell
features: Lightweight & Portable: Ideal for on-the-go play and easy storage
Durable Natural Rubber: Built to withstand tough play sessions
Squeaky Design: Keeps dogs engaged and mentally stimulated
Versatile Usage: Suitable for both indoor and outdoor play
Unscented & Non-Toxic: Safe for dogs with sensitive noses or allergies
description: Introducing the Zoon Uber-Activ Rubber Squeaky Ball Dumbbell, a versatile and engaging pet toy designed for adult dogs of medium to large breeds. Crafted from durable, natural rubber, this fetch toy is lightweight and portable, making it perfect for both indoor and outdoor play. The ball features a built-in squeaker for interactive fun and mental stimulation, while its solid, orange color and solid pattern ensure high visibility during play. Weighing in at 0.24 kilograms, this toy is ideal for dogs that enjoy a good game of fetch or tug-of-war. Simply toss, squeak, and watch your furry friend enjoy hours of entertainment and exercise.
